title: Classification of Offenses Committed by Workers
content:
The offenses committed by the workers are classified as SERIOUS and LESS SERIOUS offenses.

Serious Offenses Penalties:
- 1st Offense: Suspension from participation in the overseas employment program for six months and one day to one year.
- 2nd Offense: Permanent disqualification from participation in the overseas employment program.
- 3rd Offense: (No penalty specified)

Less Serious Offenses Penalties:
- 1st Offense: Suspension from participation in the overseas employment program for two months to six months.
- 2nd Offense: Suspension from participation in the overseas employment program for six months and one day to one year.
- 3rd Offense: Permanent disqualification from participation in the overseas employment program.

Refer to Table 2 for the list of offenses and their corresponding penalties.

metadata.source_file: 2002 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of OFWs Primer.pdf
